steps.title: Read the 1891 values
steps.content: The question asks for the city with the largest population in 1891. In that year, the graph shows one city near 220,000, higher than Toronto at about 180,000, Quebec City near 60,000, and Halifax near 40,000.

steps.title: Eliminate smaller cities
steps.content: Choice A is second highest in 1891, not the largest. Choice C is far lower than the top two cities. Choice D is the smallest of the four that year. The highest 1891 value belongs to Montreal. The answer is B.
